medialive.channel.udpoutputsettings.Buff.Docs: The UDP output buffering in milliseconds. Larger values increase latency through the transcoder but simultaneously assist the transcoder in maintaining a constant, low-jitter UDP/RTP output while accommodating clock recovery, input switching, input disruptions, picture reordering, and so on.

medialive.channel.udpoutputsettings.Cont.Docs: The settings for the UDP output.

medialive.channel.udpoutputsettings.Dest.Docs: The destination address and port number for RTP or UDP packets. These can be unicast or multicast RTP or UDP (for example, rtp://239.10.10.10:5001 or udp://10.100.100.100:5002).

medialive.channel.udpoutputsettings.FecO.Docs: The settings for enabling and adjusting Forward Error Correction on UDP outputs.
